commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Maintainers need to approve the public config/SDK contract and require live Telegram proof; there is no narrow automated repair target from this review.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found in the inspected SSRF-guarded fetch, dependency pin, plugin-loader, SDK, and channel-runtime changes. (sha=9d954e918b871d37614ae38e33569c665940156d)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds scoped mention-pattern policy config and SDK helpers, wires provider/agent/conversation gating through bundled channel runtimes, updates docs/generated baselines/tests, and carries related dependency/runtime alignment changes.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this PR adds a new public config/SDK feature. Source inspection shows current main lacks the scoped policy resolver and mentionPatternsMode config surface.
commands.review_followup: Maintainers need to approve the public config/SDK contract and require live Telegram proof; there is no narrow automated repair target from this review.

target.title: feat: add scoped mention pattern policy
target.author: patrick-slimelab
